faqPage.metaTitle: FAQ — Travel Agency Website & Software Solution
faqPage.metaDesc: Frequently asked questions about our platform — pricing, features, security, and support for travel agencies and tour operators.
faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subA: Everything you need to know about our platform. Can't find what you're looking for?
faqPage.stillDesc: Our team is happy to help. Book a personalized demo or send us a message.

items.g1q: What is Travel Agency Website & Software Solution?
items.g1a: It is a complete travel agency management platform. It helps you manage leads, create quotations, confirm bookings, generate invoices, track payments, handle vendors, and run reports — all in one place. It's built specifically for travel agencies and tour operators.
items.g2q: Who is this platform designed for?
items.g2a: It's designed for travel agencies, tour operators, Hajj/Umrah service providers, and any business that handles travel bookings. Whether you're a single-person agency or a team of 50+, the platform scales with your needs.
items.g3q: Can I use this for Hajj and Umrah services?
items.g3a: Yes. We have a dedicated Hajj/Umrah module that handles pilgrim registration, package creation with hotel class and transport, room allocation, family grouping, mahram tracking, installment plans, and departure management.
items.g4q: Do I need any technical knowledge to use this?
items.g4a: No. Our platform is designed for travel professionals, not developers. The interface is straightforward — if you can use Facebook or WhatsApp, you can use our platform.
items.p1a: Four plans: Basic (৳500/mo, 500 clients & bookings), Pro (৳800/mo, 1,000 clients & bookings + website + SMS/Email), Business (৳1,500/mo, 2,000 clients & bookings + advanced features), and Unlimited (custom pricing, all features + full automation).
items.p2q: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan later?
items.p2a: Absolutely. You can upgrade at any time and the change takes effect immediately. Downgrading is also possible at the end of your billing cycle. Your data is always preserved.
items.p3q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.p3a: We accept bank transfer, bKash, and SSLCommerz for subscription payments. For Unlimited plans, we can arrange custom billing.
items.f1q: Can I create and send quotations to clients?
items.f1a: Yes. The quotation builder lets you add multiple items with pricing, apply discounts, and generate professional PDF quotations. You can track their status (Draft, Sent, Approved, Rejected, Expired) and convert approved quotes directly into bookings.
items.f2q: How does the booking management work?
items.f2a: Bookings support multiple types: tours, flights, hotels, visas, and transport. Each booking can have travelers with passport details, vendor assignments, document uploads, an operations checklist, and a full event timeline. You can also track payment status per booking.
items.f3q: Can I manage vendor costs and track profitability?
items.f3a: Yes. You can assign vendor costs to bookings, track vendor bills (Unpaid, Partial, Paid, Overdue), and see booking-level profitability showing selling price minus vendor cost for gross profit margins.
items.f4a: Reports include: sales analytics, lead-to-booking conversion, payment collection vs outstanding, vendor payable summaries, staff performance comparisons, and booking-level profitability. All reports support date range filters and CSV export.
items.f5q: Can I control what my team members can access?
items.f5a: Yes. Role-based access control lets you define permissions per module (create, edit, delete, approve, export). Built-in roles include Owner, Manager, Accountant, Sales Agent, and Operations staff. You can also create custom roles.
items.s1a: Yes. Each agency gets a completely isolated workspace. Your data is never shared with other agencies. We use encrypted connections, secure authentication, and regular backups.
items.s2a: Yes. Most reports and tables support CSV export. You can also export client lists, booking data, and financial records at any time.
items.s3a: Your data is stored on secure servers. We follow industry-standard practices for data protection and privacy. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
items.sup1a: Free plan users get community support. Basic and Pro plans include email support with 24-hour response times. Business and Enterprise plans get priority support with faster response and dedicated contacts.
items.sup2a: Yes. All paid plans include basic onboarding guidance. Enterprise plans get a dedicated onboarding manager who helps with data migration, team training, and custom setup.
items.sup3q: Can I request a new feature?
items.sup3a: Absolutely. We actively listen to our users. You can submit feature requests through our support channel. Many current features were built based on travel agency feedback.

legal.privacyMeta: Read our privacy policy. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data.
legal.termsMeta: Read our terms of service. Understand the rules and guidelines for using our travel agency management platform.
legal.contactBody:
Email: support@travelagencyweb.com
Phone: +880 1234-567890
Address: Dhaka, Bangladesh

p: Travel Agency Website & Software Solution ("we", "our", "us") is a multi-tenant travel agency management platform. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.
**Account Information:** When you register, we collect your name, email address, phone number, company name, and password.
**Business Data:** Client records, booking details, invoices, payment records, vendor information, and other operational data you enter into the platform.

**Traveler Information:** Passport details, travel documents, and personal information of travelers managed through your agency. This data is stored on behalf of your agency and is your responsibility to collect with proper consent.
**Usage Data:** We automatically collect information about how you interact with the platform, including pages visited, features used, and session duration.
**Payment Information:** Subscription payment details such as transaction IDs and payment method. We do not store full credit card numbers.
We use collected information to:
list: Send transactional notifications (booking confirmations, payment receipts)
Improve platform features and user experience
Ensure platform security and prevent fraud

p: Each agency on our platform operates in a completely isolated workspace. Your business data (clients, bookings, invoices, vendor information) is never accessible to other agencies or tenants on the platform. Super-admin access is limited to platform management and does not include access to your operational data content.
We do not sell your data. We may share information with:
list: **Payment Processors:** SSLCommerz, bKash, or other payment gateways to process subscription payments
**SMS/Email Providers:** To deliver notifications you configure
**Legal Requirements:** When required by law or to protect our rights

p: We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted connections (HTTPS), secure authentication with hashed passwords, regular backups, and access controls. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

We retain your data as long as your account is active. If you cancel your subscription, your data will be retained for 90 days before permanent deletion. You can request earlier deletion by contacting support.

You have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data. You can export most data through the platform's built-in export features. For account deletion or data requests, contact us at support@travelagencyweb.com.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance.
If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at:
By accessing or using Travel Agency Website & Software Solution ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Platform.

The Platform is a multi-tenant software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform for travel agency management. It provides tools for lead management, quotation building, booking operations, invoicing, payment tracking, vendor management, team collaboration, and reporting.

To use the Platform, you must register an account with accurate information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. Each agency operates as a separate tenant with isolated data.

The Platform offers multiple subscription plans with varying features and limits. You will be billed according to your selected plan and billing cycle (monthly or yearly). Prices are in Bangladeshi Taka (BDT) unless otherwise stated.

You may upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades take effect at the end of the current billing cycle. Refunds are not provided for partial billing periods unless required by law.
You agree not to:
list: Use the Platform for any unlawful purpose
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to other tenants' data
Interfere with or disrupt the Platform's infrastructure
Upload malicious code, viruses, or harmful content
Resell access to the Platform without written consent
Use the Platform to store or transmit content that violates any applicable law

p: You retain ownership of all data you enter into the Platform, including client records, booking details, financial data, and documents. We do not claim ownership of your business data. You grant us a limited license to process and store this data solely for the purpose of providing the service.

We strive to maintain 99.9% uptime but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. Scheduled maintenance will be communicated in advance when possible. We are not liable for any losses resulting from temporary service unavailability.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Platform shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, business opportunities, or goodwill, arising from your use of the Platform.

Either party may terminate the agreement at any time. You can cancel your subscription from your account settings. We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. Upon termination, your data will be retained for 90 days before permanent deletion.

We may modify these Terms of Service at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email to registered users. Continued use of the Platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Bangladesh. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be resolved in the courts of Dhaka, Bangladesh.
For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at:
